skill: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables
stem:
y = 22
y = −2(x − 10)² + 17

If the given equations are graphed in the xy-plane, at how many points do the graphs of the equations intersect?
rationale: The second equation is a downward-opening parabola with vertex (10, 17), so its maximum y-value is 17. The horizontal line y = 22 lies entirely above this maximum, so the graphs do not intersect. There are zero intersection points.
